hero.name: Patrick Hennes
hero.tagline: Crafting interfaces that feel as good as they look — built with precision, driven by curiosity.

showcase.title: Selected Work
showcase.subtitle: A collection of projects where design meets function.

scoon.name: Scoon
scoon.description: A next-generation iOS creator platform for short-form content. Designed from the ground up with a dark, immersive UI system.

amigon.name: Amigon
amigon.description: A mental health companion app focused on calm interaction design, daily mood tracking, and gentle AI-assisted journaling.

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.description: This very site — designed and built to showcase my craft. Dark glassmorphism aesthetic with multilingual support.

dataflow.name: DataFlow
dataflow.description: A SaaS dashboard for real-time analytics with complex data visualisation, custom chart components, and role-based access.

services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: End-to-end product design and development — from first sketch to final build.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: From wireframe to pixel-perfect interface. I craft intuitive, visually compelling experiences grounded in real user needs.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Modern, fast, responsive web apps built with the best tools in the ecosystem — performant by default.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: Native iOS and cross-platform apps that feel right. SwiftUI, React Native, and everything in between.

ai.title: AI-Powered Workflow
ai.description: I leverage the latest AI tools to deliver faster, smarter, and higher-quality results without sacrificing craft.

stack.title: Stack & Tools
stack.subtitle: The technologies and tools I work with every day.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: The person behind the pixels.
about.bio1: I'm Patrick — an Austrian freelance UI/UX designer and developer based in Vienna. I've spent the last few years building digital products that are both beautiful and functional.
about.bio2: My work spans mobile apps, web platforms, and design systems. I'm passionate about the intersection of design and technology, always seeking the cleanest, most elegant solution.
about.bio3: I stay at the cutting edge by integrating AI tools into every stage of my workflow — from ideation to delivery — which lets me move faster without ever compromising quality.

contact.title: Let's Build Something
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Drop me a message and let's see what we can create together.
